summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smart Election Patrol & Incident Response System. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. Full incident lifecycle from map selection to officer assignment to resolution tested successfully.
passed_tests: POST /api/incident creates incident and assigns nearest officer
Officer status changes to 'busy' after assignment
PATCH /api/incident/status resolves incident and frees officer
Frontend loads with Leaflet map centered on Anantapur
Map displays 5 officer markers with green borders
Map click shows user marker and 'Report Incident' button
Report Incident triggers API and shows assigned officer info
Accept Dispatch starts officer movement with live updates
Officer reaches incident and shows 'Incident Resolved' state
Report New Incident button resets system to idle state
Top bar displays 'Election Patrol' text correctly
Floating card UI is professional and responsive
Live distance and ETA updates work correctly
